summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of KitchenBase Despensa (Pantry) flow. Tested PAN-001 (main pantry screen), MOD-001 (add ingredient modal), and MOD-002 (edit ingredient modal). All 14 feature requirements validated successfully. Catalog search works with accent and case insensitivity. Design system adheres to specifications (terracotta #C2714F, Playfair Display, Spanish UI). One minor UI issue identified: overlay z-index requires force clicks in automated tests.

ui_bugs.issue: Modal scrim and 'Made with Emergent' badge intercept pointer events, requiring force=True for automated test clicks
ui_bugs.note: Does not affect real user interactions, only automated testing. Users can click normally.

passed_tests: Empty state: 'Tu despensa está vacía' with 'Añadir mi primer ingrediente' button (verified in code, user already has items)
PAN-001: Sticky search bar 'Buscar en mi despensa…' and segmented control with 'Por ubicación' (default) and 'Por categoría'
MOD-001 catalog search: Non-existent ingredient 'pimientonegro123' reveals 'Crear ingrediente nuevo' option
MOD-001 form step: Quantity (numeric), Unidad (dropdown with base unit + conversions), Ubicación segmented (Nevera/Despensa/Congelador), 'Marcar como básico' toggle
MOD-001 form: Cantidad/Unidad disabled when basic toggle is ON
MOD-001 'Crear ingrediente nuevo': Opens with typed name pre-filled, requires Categoría and Unidad base (g/ml), shows info banner about pending validation
PAN-001 row rendering: Items appear in correct groups (Nevera/Despensa/Congelador in 'Por ubicación' view), quantity + unit symbol displayed
PAN-001 client-side search: Typing 'tomate' filters list by ingredient name, accent/case-insensitive in real time
PAN-001 view mode toggle: Switching to 'Por categoría' regroups items by category; switching back regroups by location
PAN-001 collapsible groups: Tapping section header toggles visibility of items in that group
MOD-002 edit modal: Tapping item row opens MOD-002 pre-filled with item data, title is ingredient name, subtitle shows category
MOD-002 delete: 'Eliminar' button shows confirmation dialog with Spanish text, confirm deletes the row
FAB: Floating + button bottom-right opens MOD-001

Design system: Terracotta #C2714F for primary buttons and active states, brand-light #FDF3EF for selected backgrounds, Playfair Display for modal titles, Inter for body/labels, no drop shadows, 8px/12px rounded corners
All UI text in Spanish, no console errors related to Supabase queries
Catalog ingredients verified: Tomate, Plátano, Aceite de oliva, Sal, Ajo, Pechuga de pollo all searchable
